title: pilosella muscelii
intro: Pilosella musculi is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is commonly known as the Sheep's Sorrel. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its high content of malic acid and oxalic acid, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pilosella musculi include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pilosella musculi can be found in teas, capsules, and infusions, and it is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
